primaryArchetype.name: The Quiet Strategist
primaryArchetype.description: You observe deeply and act with deliberate planning, offering carefully considered insights and maintaining a calm, introspective presence.

secondaryArchetype.name: The Socratic Connector
secondaryArchetype.description: You connect deeply through thoughtful questioning and warm diplomatic presence, preferring collaboration and dialogue over direct commands.

insights.title: You are a master of social diplomacy.
insights.body: You deliver thoughts with gentleness and tact, prioritizing safety and ensuring nobody feels threatened or put on the spot.
insights.alternativeBody: Others might feel you sweep hard truths under the rug or hide your genuine opinions to maintain peace.

insights.title: You are a thoughtful observer.
insights.body: You listen closely and process interactions deeply before intervening. This gives your contributions high impact, as they are backed by reasoning.
insights.alternativeBody: People who thrive on quick interactions might misinterpret your quietness as critical evaluation.

insights.title: You are highly collaborative and receptive.
insights.body: You value other people's perspectives, yield to the group consensus, and create space for collective choices.
insights.alternativeBody: Others might view you as passive, indecisive, or hesitant to advocate for your own needs.

insights.title: You bring stable consistency.
insights.body: You honor plans, follow structured conventions, and provide a reliable anchor of routine for those around you.
insights.alternativeBody: Others might experience you as rigid, stubborn, or resistant to necessary adjustments when circumstances change.

insights.title: You are deeply patient and deliberate.
insights.body: You prefer to slow down, analyze all details, and make sure things are done correctly and safely.
insights.alternativeBody: Others can find your pace slow or frustrating, misinterpreting caution as hesitation or stalling.

insights.title: You focus objectively on tasks and results.
insights.body: You prioritize logical progress, timelines, and raw results over social dynamics to get things done.
insights.alternativeBody: Others may feel you are cold, transactional, or insensitive to the emotional climate of the group.

insights.title: You maintain a composed, steady presence.
insights.body: You keep your feelings and doubts private, presenting a calm, objective, and dependable exterior under pressure.
insights.alternativeBody: Others can find you guarded, robotic, or hard to read, making it difficult for them to establish deep trust.

insights.title: You seek harmony and de-escalate tension.
insights.body: You use diplomacy, defusion, and patience to resolve friction, ensuring that discussions stay safe and calm.
insights.alternativeBody: Others might feel you avoid necessary conflict, sweeping critical arguments under the rug to maintain artificial peace.

insights.title: You carry deep gravitas and respect.
insights.body: You treat interactions with seriousness and dignity, ensuring respect and professional weight in all matters.
insights.alternativeBody: Others may experience you as stiff, stuffy, or lacking warmth, feeling they cannot laugh or relax around you.

primaryArchetype.name: The Independent Explorer
primaryArchetype.description: You value autonomy and direct action, exploring ideas independently and voicing your candid perspective without hesitation.

secondaryArchetype.name: The Quiet Strategist
secondaryArchetype.description: You observe deeply and act with deliberate planning, offering carefully considered insights and maintaining a calm, introspective presence.

insights.title: Your transparency is refreshing.
insights.body: You speak clearly and without filters. People know exactly where they stand with you, making you a reliable truth-teller in team settings.
insights.alternativeBody: In emotionally charged situations, your high directness could be perceived as blunt or insensitive.

insights.title: You bring stable consistency.
insights.body: You honor plans, follow structured conventions, and provide a reliable anchor of routine for those around you.
insights.alternativeBody: Others might experience you as rigid, stubborn, or resistant to necessary adjustments when circumstances change.

insights.title: You focus objectively on tasks and results.
insights.body: You prioritize logical progress, timelines, and raw results over social dynamics to get things done.
insights.alternativeBody: Others may feel you are cold, transactional, or insensitive to the emotional climate of the group.

insights.title: You maintain a composed, steady presence.
insights.body: You keep your feelings and doubts private, presenting a calm, objective, and dependable exterior under pressure.
insights.alternativeBody: Others can find you guarded, robotic, or hard to read, making it difficult for them to establish deep trust.

insights.title: You address conflict head-on.
insights.body: You step directly into tension, believing that honest debate and clearing the air is the healthiest path.
insights.alternativeBody: Others can find your approach intimidating, feeling that you are argumentative or picking unnecessary fights.

insights.title: You drive growth through direct correction.
insights.body: You provide honest, constructive critiques pointing out flaws immediately to help others meet high standards.
insights.alternativeBody: Others can experience your feedback as harsh, discouraging, or feeling that their efforts are never good enough.

insights.title: You carry deep gravitas and respect.
insights.body: You treat interactions with seriousness and dignity, ensuring respect and professional weight in all matters.
insights.alternativeBody: Others may experience you as stiff, stuffy, or lacking warmth, feeling they cannot laugh or relax around you.

primaryArchetype.name: The Independent Explorer
primaryArchetype.description: You value autonomy and direct action, exploring ideas independently and voicing your candid perspective without hesitation.

secondaryArchetype.name: The Empathic Challenger
secondaryArchetype.description: You combine raw honesty with intense social engagement, challenging group consensus directly out of care and interest in improvement.

insights.title: Your transparency is refreshing.
insights.body: You speak clearly and without filters. People know exactly where they stand with you, making you a reliable truth-teller in team settings.
insights.alternativeBody: In emotionally charged situations, your high directness could be perceived as blunt or insensitive.

insights.title: You command authority and lead decisions.
insights.body: You confidently take charge, state your choices, and steer groups forward out of a desire for clarity and execution.
insights.alternativeBody: Others can experience you as overbearing, stubborn, or dominating, feeling their input has been ignored.

insights.title: You operate with urgent momentum.
insights.body: You act quickly, decide fast, and keep conversations and projects moving at a high pace.
insights.alternativeBody: Others may feel rushed or run over, experiencing your speed as impulsive or careless.

insights.title: You focus objectively on tasks and results.
insights.body: You prioritize logical progress, timelines, and raw results over social dynamics to get things done.
insights.alternativeBody: Others may feel you are cold, transactional, or insensitive to the emotional climate of the group.

insights.title: You maintain a composed, steady presence.
insights.body: You keep your feelings and doubts private, presenting a calm, objective, and dependable exterior under pressure.
insights.alternativeBody: Others can find you guarded, robotic, or hard to read, making it difficult for them to establish deep trust.

insights.title: You address conflict head-on.
insights.body: You step directly into tension, believing that honest debate and clearing the air is the healthiest path.
insights.alternativeBody: Others can find your approach intimidating, feeling that you are argumentative or picking unnecessary fights.

insights.title: You drive growth through direct correction.
insights.body: You provide honest, constructive critiques pointing out flaws immediately to help others meet high standards.
insights.alternativeBody: Others can experience your feedback as harsh, discouraging, or feeling that their efforts are never good enough.

insights.title: You carry deep gravitas and respect.
insights.body: You treat interactions with seriousness and dignity, ensuring respect and professional weight in all matters.
insights.alternativeBody: Others may experience you as stiff, stuffy, or lacking warmth, feeling they cannot laugh or relax around you.
